cipher_books.description:
You wake up in a dimly lit study. Dust motes swirl through shafts of light.
A tall bookshelf lines the wall. A worn armchair sits by a cold fireplace.
A large desk holds a brass lamp, a note, and a strange box.
An iron door blocks your escape, beside it glows a numeric keypad.
cipher_books.note:
They are not just books—they speak. Listen well:
Third from Poe, fifth from Shelley, first from Doyle, fourth from Verne.
Their voices will unlock the way.

books.verne: Journey to the Center of the Earth

book_swap.description:
You step into a towering library. Dust drifts through narrow beams of light.
A rolling ladder stands beside warped shelves. An old globe rests on a pedestal.
Somewhere in here, a hidden mechanism protects the way forward.

variants.variant_intro: The hunter watches from winter skies.
variants.variant_clue: Name the winter hunter traced by three bright stars.
Speak the brightest star of Lyra.

variants.variant_intro: Blue fire marks the giant's foot.

vault_revelation.description:
The vault door seals behind you with a metallic hush.
Inside, a single pedestal holds a journal stamped with your own initials.
Its first line reads: 'The room remembers each attempt.'
